evals.description: New article — answer-first structure with H2/H3 hierarchy and sourced statistics
assertions: Article opens with an answer-first paragraph that directly addresses the topic
H2 headings follow the provided outline structure
Article includes at least 2 statistics with source attribution
Statistics are from named, credible sources (not generic claims)
Article includes an FAQ section with at least 3 questions
Headings do not start with 'In this article' or similar meta commentary
Article avoids generic AI phrases like 'in today's digital landscape' or 'it's crucial to'

evals.description: Section rewrite — rewrites a single section with improved readability

input.current_content: Security is very important for WordPress sites. Many sites get hacked every day. You should protect your site. There are many ways to do this.

assertions: Rewritten section is more specific and concrete than the original
Rewritten section includes at least one specific statistic or factual claim
Passive voice is reduced compared to the original
Section maintains the target keyword naturally without keyword stuffing
Rewritten version is longer and more substantive than the original

evals.description: Introduction only — writes a strong hook that passes AI detection

input.title: How to Speed Up WordPress: A 2025 Performance Guide

assertions: Introduction does not start with 'In today's' or other AI-tell openers
Introduction states the core answer or value proposition within the first 2 sentences
Introduction includes a specific hook (statistic, surprising fact, or direct question)
Target keyword appears naturally in the first paragraph
